title: Young People in the Limelight: Photography Workshop for Underage Asylum Seekers 2015-2016
description: The dataset consists of three field journals by researchers and six interviews of underage asylum seekers participating in a photography workshop. The data were collected as part of a research project entitled "Young People in the Limelight" funded by the Kone foundation. The researchers organised a photography workshop in Southern Finland for underage asylum seekers who had come to Finland alone. The workshops included photography exercises, and the participants photographed their everyday life
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
